lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar sat naam karataa purakh nirbhau niravair akaal moorat ajoonee saibhan gur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred. Image Of The Undying. Beyond Birth. Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਘਰੁ ੧ ਸੋ ਦਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: raag aasaa mahalaa 1 ghar 1 so dar |
lines.english: Raag Aasaa, First Mehl, First House, So Dar ~ That Gate:

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਾਜੇ ਤੇਰੇ ਨਾਦ ਅਨੇਕ ਅਸੰਖਾ ਕੇਤੇ ਤੇਰੇ ਵਾਵਣਹਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: vaaje tere naad anek asankhaa kete tere vaavanahaare |
lines.english: Countless musical instruments of so many various kinds vibrate there for You; so many are the musicians there for You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਦਰੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਕੇਹਾ ਸੋ ਘਰੁ ਕੇਹਾ ਜਿਤੁ ਬਹਿ ਸਰਬ ਸਮੑਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: so dar teraa kehaa so ghar kehaa jit beh sarab samaale |
lines.english: What is that Gate, and what is that Home, in which You sit and take care of all?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਤੇ ਤੇਰੇ ਰਾਗ ਪਰੀ ਸਿਉ ਕਹੀਅਹਿ ਕੇਤੇ ਤੇਰੇ ਗਾਵਣਹਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: kete tere raag paree siau kaheeeh kete tere gaavanahaare |
lines.english: There are so many Ragas there for You, along with their accompanying harmonies; so many minstrels sing to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਨੑਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਪਉਣੁ ਪਾਣੀ ਬੈਸੰਤਰੁ ਗਾਵੈ ਰਾਜਾ ਧਰਮ ਦੁਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: gaavana tudhano paun paanee baisantar gaavai raajaa dharam duaare |
lines.english: The winds sing to You, as do water and fire; the Righteous Judge of Dharma sings at Your Door.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਨੑਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਚਿਤੁ ਗੁਪਤੁ ਲਿਖਿ ਜਾਣਨਿ ਲਿਖਿ ਲਿਖਿ ਧਰਮੁ ਵੀਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: gaavana tudhano chit gupat likh jaanan likh likh dharam veechaare |
lines.english: Chitar and Gupat, the recording angels of the conscious and the subconscious, sing to You; they know, and they write, and on the basis of what they write, the Lord of Dharma passes judgement.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਨੑਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਇੰਦ੍ਰ ਇੰਦ੍ਰਾਸਣਿ ਬੈਠੇ ਦੇਵਤਿਆ ਦਰਿ ਨਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: gaavana tudhano indr indraasan baitthe devatiaa dar naale |
lines.english: The Indras, seated upon their celestial thrones, with the deities at Your Gate, sing to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਨੑਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਈਸਰੁ ਬ੍ਰਹਮਾ ਦੇਵੀ ਸੋਹਨਿ ਤੇਰੇ ਸਦਾ ਸਵਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: gaavana tudhano eesar brahamaa devee sohan tere sadaa savaare |
lines.english: Shiva and Brahma and the Goddess Parvaati, so beautiful and ever adorned by You, sing to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਨੑਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਸਿਧ ਸਮਾਧੀ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਗਾਵਨੑਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਸਾਧ ਬੀਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: gaavana tudhano sidh samaadhee andar gaavana tudhano saadh beechaare |
lines.english: The Siddhas in Samaadhi sing to You, and the Holy Saints, in their contemplative meditation, sing to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਨੑਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਜਤੀ ਸਤੀ ਸੰਤੋਖੀ ਗਾਵਨਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਵੀਰ ਕਰਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: gaavana tudhano jatee satee santokhee gaavan tudhano veer karaare |
lines.english: The celibates, the truthful and the patient beings sing to You, and the mighty warriors sing to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਨਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਪੰਡਿਤ ਪੜੇ ਰਖੀਸੁਰ ਜੁਗੁ ਜੁਗੁ ਬੇਦਾ ਨਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: gaavan tudhano panddit parre rakheesur jug jug bedaa naale |
lines.english: The scholarly Pandits sing to You, along with the holy Rishis and the readers of the Vedas throughout the ages.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਨੑਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਰਤਨ ਉਪਾਏ ਤੇਰੇ ਜੇਤੇ ਅਠਸਠਿ ਤੀਰਥ ਨਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: gaavana tudhano ratan upaae tere jete atthasatth teerath naale |
lines.english: The fourteen priceless jewels created by You, and the sixty-eight holy places of pilgrimage, sing to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਨਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਮੋਹਣੀਆ ਮਨੁ ਮੋਹਨਿ ਸੁਰਗੁ ਮਛੁ ਪਇਆਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: gaavan tudhano mohaneea man mohan surag machh peaale |
lines.english: The Mohinis, the heavenly beauties who entice the heart in paradise, in this world and in the nether regions, sing to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਨੑਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਜੋਧ ਮਹਾਬਲ ਸੂਰਾ ਗਾਵਨੑਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਖਾਣੀ ਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: gaavana tudhano jodh mahaabal sooraa gaavana tudhano khaanee chaare |
lines.english: The mighty warriors and the divine heroes sing to You, and the four sources of creation sing to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਨੑਿ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਖੰਡ ਮੰਡਲ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੰਡਾ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਰਖੇ ਤੇਰੇ ਧਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: gaavana tudhano khandd manddal brahamanddaa kar kar rakhe tere dhaare |
lines.english: The continents, the worlds and the solar systems, created and installed by Your Hand, sing to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਈ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਗਾਵਨੑਿ ਜੋ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵਨੑਿ ਰਤੇ ਤੇਰੇ ਭਗਤ ਰਸਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: seee tudhano gaavana jo tudh bhaavana rate tere bhagat rasaale |
lines.english: They alone sing to You, who are pleasing to Your Will, and who are imbued with the nectar of Your devotional worship.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਸੋਈ ਸਦਾ ਸਚੁ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਾਚੀ ਨਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: soee soee sadaa sach saahib saachaa saachee naaee |
lines.english: That Lord and Master - He is True, forever True; He is True, and True is His Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਰਿ ਕੇਤੇ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਗਾਵਨਿ ਸੇ ਮੈ ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਆਵਨਿ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਕਿਆ ਬੀਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: hor kete tudhano gaavan se mai chit na aavan naanak kiaa beechaare |
lines.english: So many others sing to You, they do not come into my mind; how can Nanak think of them?

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਗੀ ਰੰਗੀ ਭਾਤੀ ਜਿਨਸੀ ਮਾਇਆ ਜਿਨਿ ਉਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: rangee rangee bhaatee jinasee maaeaa jin upaaee |
lines.english: He created the world of Maya with its various colors and species.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੈ ਭੀ ਹੋਸੀ ਜਾਇ ਨ ਜਾਸੀ ਰਚਨਾ ਜਿਨਿ ਰਚਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: hai bhee hosee jaae na jaasee rachanaa jin rachaaee |
lines.english: He who created the creation is True, and He shall always be True; He shall not depart, even when the creation departs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋਈ ਕਰਸੀ ਫਿਰਿ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਕਰਣਾ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jo tis bhaavai soee karasee fir hukam na karanaa jaaee |
lines.english: Whatever pleases Him, that is what He does. No one can issue any commands to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਦੇਖੈ ਕੀਤਾ ਅਪਣਾ ਜਿਉ ਤਿਸ ਦੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: kar kar dekhai keetaa apanaa jiau tis dee vaddiaaee |
lines.english: Having created the creation, He Himself watches over it, as it pleases His Greatness.
